All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

A

add(Vector2D) - Method in class Vector2D
Adds this vector to other and returns the result.
addFrameSprite(Sprite) - Method in class AnimatedSprite
Standard Java-style alias for AnimatedSprite.AddFrameSprite(Sprite).
AddFrameSprite(Sprite) - Method in class AnimatedSprite
Adds a sprite as the next animation frame and returns this.
addSprite(Sprite) - Method in class CompoundSprite
Adds a child sprite to this compound and returns this so calls can be chained.
advanceAnimationClock() - Method in class AnimatedSprite
Updates the current frame after enough game frames have passed.
angleTo(Vector2D) - Method in class Vector2D
Returns the angle in radians you would need to rotate this vector to point in the same direction as other.
AnimatedSprite - Class in coxprogramming.processing.sprites
A sprite that creates animation by showing one sprite frame at a time.
AnimatedSprite(PApplet, float, float) - Constructor for class AnimatedSprite
Creates an empty AnimatedSprite at position (x, y).
AnimatedSprite(PApplet, float, float, float, float) - Constructor for class AnimatedSprite
Creates an empty AnimatedSprite at position (x, y) with a starting group velocity.

B

bind(Object, String) - Method in class Event
Attaches a listener function to this event so it will be called whenever Event.trigger(Object...) is invoked.
Blob - Class in coxprogramming.processing.sprites
A circular sprite with a color and a radius.
Blob(PApplet, float, float, float, float, float, int) - Constructor for class Blob
Creates a moving Blob at position (x, y) with a given velocity.
Blob(PApplet, float, float, float, int) - Constructor for class Blob
Creates a stationary Blob at position (x, y).
Block - Class in coxprogramming.processing.sprites
A rectangular sprite with a width and a height.
Block(PApplet, float, float, float, float, int) - Constructor for class Block
Creates a stationary Block.
BouncyWalls - Enum constant in enum class ScreenBehavior
Sprites bounce off the edges by reversing the relevant component of their velocity â€” like a ball bouncing off a wall.
bound(Object, String) - Method in class Event
Returns true if the given function is currently bound to this event, or false if it is not.

C

collidesWith(Blob) - Method in class Blob
Checks whether this Blob is touching another Blob.
CompoundSprite - Class in coxprogramming.processing.sprites
A sprite made up of multiple other sprites that move together as a group.
CompoundSprite(PApplet, float, float) - Constructor for class CompoundSprite
Creates a CompoundSprite at position (x, y) with no initial velocity.
CompoundSprite(PApplet, float, float, float, float) - Constructor for class CompoundSprite
Creates a CompoundSprite at position (x, y) with a given starting velocity.
coxprogramming.processing.sprites - package coxprogramming.processing.sprites
 

D

distanceTo(Sprite) - Method in class Sprite
Returns the straight-line distance in pixels between the center of this sprite and the center of other.
dotProduct(Vector2D) - Method in class Vector2D
Computes the dot product of this vector and other.
drawSprite() - Method in class AnimatedSprite
Draws the current frame sprite, then advances the animation clock.
drawSprite() - Method in class Blob
Draws this Blob as a filled circle centered at its current position.
drawSprite() - Method in class Block
Draws this Block as a filled rectangle with no outline.
drawSprite() - Method in class CompoundSprite
Draws every child sprite in the order they were added.
drawSprite() - Method in class ImageSprite
Draws the image centered on this sprite's current position.
drawSprite() - Method in class Sprite
Draws this sprite on the screen.

E

Event - Class in coxprogramming.processing.sprites
A flexible event system that lets different parts of your game communicate with each other without needing to be directly connected.
Event(Class<?>...) - Constructor for class Event
Creates a new Event and declares what types of values it will pass to its listeners when triggered.

F

followMouse() - Method in class CompoundSprite
Moves the whole group toward the mouse cursor at the current speed, keeping all children in formation.
followMouse() - Method in class Sprite
Moves the sprite toward the mouse cursor at the sprite's current speed.
frameCounter - Variable in class AnimatedSprite
Counts how many game frames have passed since the animation last changed to a new frame.
frameNumber - Variable in class AnimatedSprite
Index of the frame currently being drawn.
frameRate - Variable in class AnimatedSprite
Game frames per animation frame.
FromPolar(float, float) - Static method in class Vector2D
Creates a Vector2D from polar coordinates â€” a distance and an angle.
fromSprite(Sprite) - Static method in class AnimatedSprite
Standard Java-style alias for AnimatedSprite.FromSprite(Sprite).
FromSprite(Sprite) - Static method in class AnimatedSprite
Starts an AnimatedSprite from a first frame sprite.
FromXY(float, float) - Static method in class Vector2D
Creates a Vector2D from rectangular (Cartesian) coordinates.

G

getFrameCount() - Method in class AnimatedSprite
Returns the number of sprites in this animation.
getFrameNumber() - Method in class AnimatedSprite
Returns the current animation frame index, starting at 0.
getFrameRate() - Method in class AnimatedSprite
Returns how many game frames each animation frame stays visible.
getFrameSprites() - Method in class AnimatedSprite
Returns the sprites used as animation frames.
getPosition() - Method in class Sprite
Returns the sprite's current position as a Vector2D.
getRotation() - Method in class ImageSprite
Returns this sprite's current rotation angle in radians.
getSprites() - Method in class CompoundSprite
Returns the list of child sprites belonging to this compound.
getVelocity() - Method in class Sprite
Returns the sprite's current velocity as a Vector2D.

H

h - Variable in class Block
The height of the rectangle in pixels.
h - Variable in class ImageSprite
Height used when drawing the image.
HardWalls - Enum constant in enum class ScreenBehavior
Sprites stop dead when they hit an edge and their velocity is zeroed on that axis.

I

ImageSprite - Class in coxprogramming.processing.sprites
A sprite that displays an image file instead of a drawn shape.
ImageSprite(PApplet, float, float, String) - Constructor for class ImageSprite
Creates an ImageSprite at position (x, y) and loads its image from a file.
ImageSprite(PApplet, float, float, String, float) - Constructor for class ImageSprite
Creates a square ImageSprite with a custom display size.
ImageSprite(PApplet, float, float, String, float, float) - Constructor for class ImageSprite
Creates an ImageSprite with a custom display width and height.
img - Variable in class ImageSprite
The image displayed by this sprite.
inverse() - Method in class Vector2D
Returns the additive inverse of this vector â€” the same length but pointing in the exact opposite direction.

K

keyboardControl() - Method in class CompoundSprite
Reads arrow-key input and updates the group velocity accordingly, propagating the velocity change to every child.
keyboardControl() - Method in class Sprite
Lets the player move this sprite with the arrow keys.

M

mag() - Method in class Vector2D
Returns the magnitude (length) of this vector.
move() - Method in class CompoundSprite
Moves the compound sprite forward one step by its velocity, wraps it around the screen edges if needed, then calls move() on every child.
move() - Method in class Sprite
Moves the sprite forward one step by adding its velocity to its position, then applies the current Sprite.screenBehavior to handle screen edges.
moveTo(float, float) - Method in class CompoundSprite
Instantly moves the whole group to (x, y).
moveTo(float, float) - Method in class Sprite
Instantly moves the sprite to the coordinates (x, y).
moveTo(Vector2D) - Method in class CompoundSprite
Instantly moves the whole group to the given position vector.
moveTo(Vector2D) - Method in class Sprite
Instantly moves the sprite to the position described by newPosition.
myColor - Variable in class Blob
The fill color of the circle.

N

nextFrame() - Method in class AnimatedSprite
Manually advances to the next animation frame.
NoWalls - Enum constant in enum class ScreenBehavior
Sprites ignore the edges completely and can travel off-screen without any constraint.

P

parent - Variable in class Sprite
A reference to the Processing sketch that owns this sprite.
perpendicular() - Method in class Vector2D
Returns a vector that is perpendicular (at a 90-degree right angle) to this one, rotated clockwise.
pos - Variable in class Sprite
The sprite's current position on the screen.
previousFrame() - Method in class AnimatedSprite
Manually moves to the previous animation frame.

R

radius - Variable in class Blob
The radius of the circle in pixels.
removeSprite(Sprite) - Method in class CompoundSprite
Removes a child sprite from this compound and returns this so calls can be chained.
rotate(float) - Method in class ImageSprite
Adds to this sprite's current rotation angle.
rotate(float) - Method in class Vector2D
Rotates this vector by rads radians around the origin and returns the result.
rotation - Variable in class ImageSprite
Rotation angle in radians.

S

scale(float) - Method in class Vector2D
Multiplies both components by m, making the vector longer or shorter without changing its direction.
screenBehavior - Static variable in class Sprite
Controls what happens to every sprite when it reaches the edge of the screen.
ScreenBehavior - Enum Class in coxprogramming.processing.sprites
Controls how sprites behave when they reach the edge of the screen.
setFrameNumber(int) - Method in class AnimatedSprite
Sets the current animation frame.
setFrameRate(int) - Method in class AnimatedSprite
Sets how many game frames each animation frame stays visible.
setRotation(float) - Method in class ImageSprite
Sets this sprite's rotation angle.
setSize(float) - Method in class ImageSprite
Changes this sprite to a square display size.
setSize(float, float) - Method in class ImageSprite
Changes this sprite's displayed size without changing the source image.
setVelocity(float, float) - Method in class CompoundSprite
Sets the group velocity and applies the velocity change to every child sprite, so each child gains or loses the same amount.
setVelocity(float, float) - Method in class Sprite
Sets the sprite's velocity using separate x and y values.
setVelocity(Vector2D) - Method in class CompoundSprite
Sets the group velocity from a Vector2D and applies the change to every child sprite.
setVelocity(Vector2D) - Method in class Sprite
Sets the sprite's velocity to the given Vector2D.
Sprite - Class in coxprogramming.processing.sprites
The base class for every sprite in the game.
Sprite(PApplet, float, float) - Constructor for class Sprite
Creates a sprite at position (x, y) with no initial velocity.
Sprite(PApplet, float, float, float, float) - Constructor for class Sprite
Creates a sprite at position (x, y) with a given starting velocity.
Sprite(PApplet, Vector2D) - Constructor for class Sprite
Creates a sprite at the position given by a Vector2D, with no initial velocity.
subtract(Vector2D) - Method in class Vector2D
Subtracts other from this vector and returns the result.

T

theta() - Method in class Vector2D
Returns the angle this vector makes with the positive x-axis, in radians.
trigger(Object...) - Method in class Event
Fires the event, calling every bound listener function and passing arguments to each one.

U

unbind(Object, String) - Method in class Event
Detaches a previously bound listener function from this event so it will no longer be called when the event fires.
unitVector() - Method in class Vector2D
Returns a unit vector â€” a vector pointing in the same direction as this one but with a length of exactly 1.

V

valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class ScreenBehavior
Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
values() - Static method in enum class ScreenBehavior
Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
Vector2D - Class in coxprogramming.processing.sprites
A 2D vector â€” a pair of numbers (x, y) that can represent either a position (a point on the screen) or a direction with speed (like "move 3 pixels right and 2 pixels down each frame").
Vector2D(float, float) - Constructor for class Vector2D
Creates a new Vector2D with the given x and y values.
vel - Variable in class Sprite
The sprite's current velocity â€” how far it moves each frame.

W

w - Variable in class Block
The width of the rectangle in pixels.
w - Variable in class ImageSprite
Width used when drawing the image.
Wrapping - Enum constant in enum class ScreenBehavior
Sprites wrap around: leaving one edge brings them back on the opposite side.

X

x - Variable in class Vector2D
The horizontal component.

Y

y - Variable in class Vector2D
The vertical component.
